methods.description: Process for collecting temperature data in fields using HOBO pendant temperature data loggers to determine climatic influences on pollinator activity.

steps.description: Nine fields distributed across regions were equipped with HOBO pendant temperature data loggers set at 30-minute intervals.
steps.searchable_summary: deploy temperature data loggers in fields

steps.description: Data loggers were deposited in the field prior to bloom and collected once bloom finished.
steps.searchable_summary: collect temperature data loggers after bloom

methods.description: Statistical procedures used to analyze the effects of pollen limitation and pollinator addition on fruit and seed set.

steps.description: Estimate the mean difference in fruit or seed production after supplemental pollination compared to the control using general linear models with a Gaussian distribution.
steps.searchable_summary: perform GLM analysis on fruit and seed production

steps.description: Use path analysis to examine the influence of direct and indirect effects of pollinator number and type on fruit set and seed set.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct path analysis on pollinator effects

steps.description: Run linear models of each path to assess the fit of residuals versus fitted values and check for homoscedasticity of variances.
Use the sem function in the R package Lavaan to fit the structural equation model using maximum likelihood estimation.
steps.searchable_summary: fit SEM using Lavaan in R

steps.description: Assess model fit by checking if the P-value of the maximum likelihood chi-square test statistic is greater than 0.05.
Test whether foraging behavior differed among the managed bee species using linear or generalized linear mixed models with ML estimation.
